How it works

1
Book your slot onlineChoose your day and time, pay the $30 deposit to confirm.
2
Fill in your detailsTell us your address, vehicle and any extras.
3
We come to youHome, work, shopping centre - our mobile unit arrives at your spot.
4
Done in 30-45 minPolish, seal, UV protection. Pay the balance in cash if you didn't pay online.
Ceramic coating included Our ceramic sealant bonds at a molecular level with the headlight's polymer, fusing into one hardened layer for maximum UV and abrasion protection — lasting up to 5 years depending on sun and weather exposure. It wears evenly and never looks patchy, and can be refreshed in minutes whenever you need it.
2-year warranty includedIf your headlights cloud up again within 2 years, we come back at no extra cost.

Window Cleaning
+ Waterproof

We clean your glass streak-free, then seal it with a rain-repellent waterproof coating. Homes, shops and storefronts — Gold Coast & Brisbane.

from $220cleaning + waterproofing, final price after a quick measure-up

Not sure how many windows you have? Get a quick quote first so you know your exact price — then book your spot with confidence.

1. Get a free quote 2. Book your spot

What's included

  • Interior & exterior glass, cleaned streak-free
  • Window frames, sills and tracks wiped down
  • Hydrophobic coating repels water, dust & dirt
  • Water beads off carrying dust away — stays cleaner longer
  • Homes, shops & storefronts — we bring all our own gear

Why add waterproofing?

Repels rainWater beads & rolls straight off
Repels dustLess dirt sticks to the glass
Clearer viewSee better through rain & grime
Lasts 12 monthsStays cleaner for longer
Clean + sealed in one visitWe clean your glass spotless, then seal it with a hydrophobic coating that repels water, dust and dirt. Rain beads off and carries grime with it, so your glass stays cleaner for longer — and easier to clean every time. Protection lasts up to 12 months.
Spend less on cleaningBecause dust and rain don't stick, your glass stays clean far longer — so you clean less often through the year. The coating wears off gradually and invisibly (never patchy), and when it fades we simply clean and re-apply on our next visit. No mess, no stripping, no removal.
Our pricingCleaning (inside & out) + waterproofing on every pane:
• Small home (up to 8 windows) — from $220
• Medium home (9–15 windows) — from $320
• Large / two-storey (16–25) — from $480
• Shops & storefronts — from $250
Every property is different, so we confirm the final price after a quick measure-up. Message us for a clear, no-obligation quote.

The waterproofing advantage

Fewer cleansGlass stays cleaner between visits
Rain does the workWater washes dust away
Better street appealSpotless facades, longer
Lower costsFewer call-outs over time
Cut your building's cleaning billSealing the glass with a hydrophobic coating that repels water and dust keeps your facade cleaner for longer — fewer call-outs and lower maintenance costs across the year. The coating protects for up to 12 months and wears evenly (never patchy). When it fades, we simply clean and re-apply on the next scheduled visit — no stripping or removal needed.
Set up an annual maintenance planMost buildings book us on a recurring schedule so the glass is always spotless and protected. We assess your property, give you a tailored quote, and keep your facade looking its best year-round.
